# meraki_network_firmware_upgrades_rollback (Resource)

This resource can manage the `Network Firmware Upgrades Rollback` configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "meraki_network_firmware_upgrades_rollback" "example" {
  network_id    = "L_123456"
  product       = "switch"
  time          = "2020-10-21T02:00:00Z"
  to_version_id = "7857"
  reasons = [
    {
      category = "performance"
      comment  = "Network was slower with the upgrade"
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `network_id` (String) Network ID
- `reasons` (Attributes List) Reasons for the rollback (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--reasons))

### Optional

- `product` (String) Product type to rollback (if the network is a combined network)
  - Choices: `appliance`, `camera`, `cellularGateway`, `secureConnect`, `switch`, `switchCatalyst`, `wireless`, `wirelessController`
- `time` (String) Scheduled time for the rollback
- `to_version_id` (String) The version ID

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the object

<a id="nestedatt--reasons"></a>
### Nested Schema for `reasons`

Required:

- `category` (String) Reason for the rollback
  - Choices: `broke old features`, `other`, `performance`, `stability`, `testing`, `unifying networks versions`
- `comment` (String) Additional comment about the rollback
